original_image_tags: A dark, likely photocopied or typed page. The main text is in a typewriter font. The word "RESTRICTED" is stamped in large, faded capital letters at the top and again near the bottom. Two hole-punch circles are visible on the left margin. A handwritten numeral "131" appears in the bottom right corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typed document page with a large faint “RESTRICTED” stamp at the top and bottom, two binder-hole punches along the left edge, and a short paragraph of white typewritten text describing “Albert Sams” and an incident, with a concluding line referencing “Legge account (Incident 60) and Evans’ account (Incident 60a)”.*
